cendral_matin.title: Asendral
cendral_matin.narrator: At the borders of Aerith, far from Aurenthal and its lights.
cendral_matin.text:
The sun rises on Cendral.

You sharpen your knife on the doorstep.

It's a habit.
Not to fight — for wood.
You've been sculpting since you were eight.

The village is slowly awakening.

The baker lights his oven.
Children run between houses.
Old Marek walks his dog like every morning.

Cendral isn't big.
No renown.
No garrison of Aurenthal.

Just a border village like hundreds of others.

But this is your house.

Always.

choices.text: Come in and practice with the sword.

village_calme.title: An Ordinary Morning
village_calme.text:
You put your knife down.

You sit on the wall of the square.

Cendral has always been like this.
Calm down.
Predictable.
No surprise.

Sometimes you wonder what's beyond the hills.
The other villages.
The great cities of the kingdom.
The roads you never take.

Old Marek stops next to you.

**"You're still dreaming. *

**"I observe.** you answer.

He laughs.

**"That's what all dreamers say. *

He's leaving again.

You look at the hills.

entrainement.title: The Sword
entrainement.text:
You take the sword hanging on the wall.

It belonged to your father.
Simple. Solid. No ornament.

Not an elementary blade — just iron.
In Cendral, no one can afford to go to an Auenthal blacksmith.

You start the basic moves.

Hit high. Hit the bass. Parade. Against.

You've been practicing alone for years.
Nobody in Cendral can really fight.

Just you.

By hitting the training pole,
You notice something strange.

Your hands.

A slight purple hue.
Like static electricity.

It disappears immediately.

mains_etranges.title: Some Thing of Strange
mains_etranges.text:
You turn your hands around.

Nothing.

Normal skin.
No trace.

You're shaking your fist.

A spark.
Violet.
Quick.
Real.

In Arith's legends,
There is a color associated with a single element.

Not the water.
Not the fire.
Not the earth.
Not the air.

The Chaos.

Caël's name goes through your mind.

You're putting that thought away immediately.

alerte_bandits.title: Alert
alerte_bandits.text:
A scream crosses the village.

Then another.

You run to the square.

About 20 armed bandits descend from the north hill.
On horseback.
Quick.

The villagers are fleeing.
The kids are crying.

Old Marek tries to block the passage with his stick.

A bandit hits him without stopping.

Marek falls.

evacuation.title: Evacuate
evacuation.text:
You're yelling at the villagers to run to the forest.

Some people listen to you.
Others are paralyzed.

You catch two kids by your hand.
You push them to the trees.

A bandit is blocking your way.

He smiles.

**"Where are you going? *

Behind you, you hear the burning houses.

Anger is rising.
Something goes up with her.

In your hands.
In your chest.
Everywhere.

combat_bandits.title: Combat
combat_bandits.text:
You charge the first bandit.

Your sword against his.

You're faster than them.
You always knew.

But there are twenty.

You spill three.
Four.

But the fifth hit your shoulder.

You're falling.

A bandit raises his blade above you.

Behind him, a house collapses.

The baker's child is still in there.

basculement_pouvoir.title: The Chaos
basculement_pouvoir.text:
Something breaks inside you.

No fear.
Not anger.

Something deeper.
Older.

A purple light explodes with your hands.

She's crossing the bandit in front of you.
The wall behind him.
The house behind the wall.

You don't control.

You can't control it.

It's like trying to stop a river with your hands.

The bandits fled screaming.

But power continues.

And Cendral is in his way.

cendral_detruit.title: The Decumbers
cendral_detruit.text:
Silence.

You look around.

Asendral no longer exists.

Houses are ruins.
The bakery.
The place.
The wall where you sat.

The villagers are alive.
They had time to flee.

But they look at you from afar.

With fear in the eyes.

You.

They're looking at you.

Then you see her.

In the ashes, at your feet.

A sword.

Black.
It absorbs the light around it.
As if the darkness was climbing towards its blade.

She wasn't here before.

She's here now.

Old Marek is sitting in the rubble.
He's looking at you.
He's looking at the blade.

And in his eyes you read something
You'll never forget.

He doesn't recognize you anymore.

marek_peur.title: The Eye of Marek
marek_peur.text:
You're approaching Marek.

He's back.

Old Marek who saw you grow up.
Who taught you how to sculpt the wood.
Who laughed at your dreams.

He's back in front of you.

**"Marek... It's me. *

He looks at the black blade in your hand.

His voice trembles.

**"Prophecy..."**

He's shaking his head.

**"I didn't know it was you. *

No anger.
Just fear.

**"Not you. *

He gets up and moves away without turning around.

quatre_arrivent.title: They come
quatre_arrivent.narrator: They were already on their way. For days.
quatre_arrivent.text:
You hear them before you see them.

Four horses.
Quick.

They stop at the edge of the ruins.

Four silhouettes descend from horse.

A girl with silver hair — her sword shines like water.
A boy with a tight jaw — his blade burns without turning off.
A girl with her hands covered with earth — her sword is like a rock.
A smiling boy — his sword disappears and reappears in the air.

They look at the ruins.

Then they see the blade in your hand.

The black blade.

Aryn closes her eyes for a second.

Ikar says something in a low voice.

"It's him." *

Taera put a hand on her mouth.

Vael doesn't smile anymore.

premiere_rencontre.title: The Five Blades
premiere_rencontre.text:
The silver-haired girl is moving forward.

She doesn't touch her sword.

Your name is {{player}}. *

That's not a question.

**"I am Aryn. *

She shows the other three.

**"Ikar. Taera, Vael. *

You tighten the black blade.

**"You are the Four Blades. *

All Aerith knows their names.
Their exploits.
The statues in Aurenthal.

Aryn nods his head.

**"We were waiting for you. "** she says.

**"You expected that?** you ask by showing the ruins.

Quiet.

Taera lowers your head.

**"We hoped not. *

** "But prophecy..."** said Ikar.

Aryn's taking a look at him.

refus_aide.title: Leave me alone.
refus_aide.text:
They're not moving.

Ikar is taking a step towards you.

**"This is not a suggestion. * you say.

A purple spark crackles in your hand.

Ikar stops.

Vael put a hand on his shoulder.

**"We're not leaving. "** says Ikar.
**"Even if you're mad at us. *
**" Especially if you're mad at us. *

Taera sits on a piece of collapsed wall.
Like she's planning to stay all night.

**"We have nowhere to go. "** she says slowly.
**"Neither do you. *

explication_ordre.title: The Order of Blades
explication_ordre.text:
Aryn's talking.

Long time.

The Order of Five Blades has existed for centuries.
Four warriors. Four elements.
And a Chaos porter.
Water. Fire. Air and Chaos.

**"The Chaos is the most powerful. "** she says.
**"And the most dangerous alone. *

She's taking a break.

"Three hundred years ago... Caël. *

The name falls into silence.

Even here, in the ruins, he weighs.

**"He had received a prophecy.** Continues Aryn.
**"That he would destroy everything. *
**"He wanted to avoid it. *
**"He's isolated. *
**"And in isolation..."**

She doesn't have to finish.

**"The four wise men of the time arrested him. *
**"Not killed. *
**"Stop. *
**"At the cost of their lives. *

Ikar's looking at you.

**"We've been practicing since we were seven. *
**"To not repeat this. *

Vael looks up to heaven.

**"Romantic way of saying we had no choice. *

Taera gives him a elbow.

surveille.title: Under Surveillance
surveille.text:
Aryn doesn't look away.

**"Yes. *

**"How long? *

**"Since you were born. *

Silence falls.

Ikar crosses arms.

**"That's not what you think. *

**"That's exactly what I think.** you answer.

Vael is approaching.

We didn't follow you to control you. *
**"We watched you to be there when it happened. *

He shows the ruins.

**"And we were late. *

In his voice — something that looks like guilt.

pas_prevenu.title: Why not before?
pas_prevenu.text:
Taera answers.

Easy. As always.

**"We didn't know when that would happen. *
**"The powers of Chaos are awakened differently for everyone. *

**"Some in adolescence. *
**"Others later. *
**"Some never. *

**"What if you told me from the beginning? *

She's thinking.

*"You thought? *

You don't have an answer.

Ikar lifts his shoulders.

**" Exactly. *

ce_quils_veulent.title: What They Want
ce_quils_veulent.text:
**"What do you want from me? *

Aryn looks at you for a while.

**"Learn to master Chaos. *

**"What if I don't want to? *

**"Then Aerith will end up like Cendral. *

Not bad.
Just the truth.

Ikar sits down.

**"We're not gonna force you.** he said.
**"But we're not leaving either. *

Vael gets something out of his bag.
Food.

**"It's a long night. * he says.
**"Maybe eating. *

Taera settles by the fire she just showed up.

Like it's normal.
Like they've always done this together.

nuit_ensemble.title: Around the Fire
nuit_ensemble.text:
You sit down.

Vael gives you bread.

Taera's fire burns without wood.
Just heat, wherever she wants.

**"How long have you known each other? You're asking.

Vael laughs.

**"Since we were seven. *
**"The Order brought us together. *

**"You chose? *

Ikar shakes his head.

**"No. *

Taera smiles.

**"But we would have chosen the same. *

A comfortable silence.

The kind of silence we share with people
we've known a long time.

Except you met them tonight.

nuit_ecart.title: Alone In the Black
nuit_ecart.text:
You sit away from them.

You've been watching them since the rubble.

They talk to each other in a low voice.
Sometimes they laugh.

Vael says something.
Ikar throws bread at him.
Taera sighs.
Aryn doesn't say anything but smiles.

Four friends.

Around a fire.

Like everything's fine.

As if Cendral was not in ruins behind them.

You shake your fists.

They're comfortable here.
Too comfortable.

Like it's planned.

choices.text: Stay in the shadows until you sleep.

epees_elements.title: Swords
epees_elements.text:
Ikar notices your look at her blade.

He's taking her out.

The flame lights up immediately.
Orange and blue.
Living.

**"Each blade is forged by an Austrian craftsman. "** says Aryn.
**"Allowed to the element of its bearer. *
**"Anyone can have one. *

She's taking hers out.
Translucent.
Like frozen water.

Taera put his hand on the handle.
Foam instantly grows on the stones around it.

Vael makes her appear from the air.
Literally.
It materializes from nowhere.

You look at the black blade in your hand.

"My... nobody forged it. *

**"No."** says Aryn.
**"She forged herself. *
**"It hasn't been seen since..."**

**"Since Caël. "** says Ikar.

portails_memoires.title: Their Stories
portails_memoires.narrator: Close your eyes. Let go. Trust me.
portails_memoires.text:
*"Tell me. *

Aryn's looking at you.

**"Our stories? *

**"How you discovered your powers. *
**"How you got there. *

They exchange a look.

Taera speaks first.

**"It's not a short story. *

Vael smiles.

**"The night is long. *

Aryn puts his hand on his sword.

**"Close your eyes. *
**"We'll show you. *

choices.text: Close your eyes — see Aryn's memory.
Close your eyes — see Ikar's memory.
Close your eyes — see Taera's memory.
Close your eyes — see Vael's memory.
No. You don't want to let go.

portail_aryn.title: The Memory of Aryn
portail_aryn.text:
You're opening your eyes.

The fire crackles.

Aryn's looking at you.

**"You saw. *

That's not a question.

You hate your head.

Something has changed the way you look at her.
Not much.
But something.

portail_ikar.title: The Memory of Ikar
portail_ikar.text:
You're opening your eyes.

Ikar's looking at you.

Always with your arms crossed.
Always tight jaw.

But in his eyes — something you hadn't seen before.

He's not asking if you saw.

He knows you saw it.

portail_taera.title: The Memory of Taera
portail_taera.text:
You're opening your eyes.

Taera has her hands on the ground.

She gently pulls them out.

**"The earth says you understand better now. *

She's smiling.

Not the smile she makes to reassure.

The other one.

portail_vael.title: The Memory of Vael
portail_vael.text:
You're opening your eyes.

Vael is crouched in front of you.

He looks at you with his usual smile.

Too light.
Too easy.

Then the smile changes a little.

**"Then. *

**"Then.** you answer.

That's enough.

lendemain_matin.title: The Lendemain
lendemain_matin.text:
You wake up in the rubble.

Taera's fire went out.

They're all here.
Sit.
They were waiting for you.

Aryn's getting up.

**"We're leaving today. *

**"Where? *

**« Far from Cendral. "** says Ikar.
**"People are afraid. *
**"And as long as you don't control..."**

He doesn't finish his sentence.

He doesn't need it.

You look at the ruins one last time.

Marek's house.
The bakery.
The wall of the square.

All this still exists.
Just in pieces.

au_revoir_cendral.title: See you Cendral
au_revoir_cendral.text:
You walk alone in the rubble.

Marek's house.
You stop in front of the collapsed door.

You pick something up in the ashes.

Your sculpting knife.
Intact.

You put it in your belt.

Taera followed you with no noise.

She's laying a hand on your shoulder.

She's not saying anything.

It's better that way.

depart_cendral.title: The Road
depart_cendral.text:
Four silhouettes on the road.
And you.

The sun rises in front of you.

Vael walks next to you.

**"First time you left Cendral? *

**"Yes. *

**"It's not ideal as a start. * he says.

**"No. *

He laughs slowly.

On the road, a peasant meets you.

He sees the black blade on your belt.

He's moving away.

His face.

You know that face now.
It's the same as Marek's.

The prophecy precedes you.
Wherever you go.

Ikar walks ahead.
Quick. As always.

Aryn's in the lead.
She knows the way.

Taera's behind.
She looks at Cendral one last time.

You look at the black blade.

It absorbs the morning sun.

And you don't know yet
if it's a curse
or something.

choices.text: Continue — The rest of the adventure.

fin_prologue.title: Prologue — End
fin_prologue.text:
Aerith's road is in front of you.

Four blades.
And the Chaos.

Together for the first time.

The adventure begins.

journee_marek.title: Marek
journee_marek.text:
Old Marek is sitting on his usual bench.

His dog Brun sleeps at his feet.

He sculpts something in a piece of wood.
His hands are shaking a little now.
But the gesture remains precise.

He taught you.
A long time ago.

**"You stand there or sit down? *

He didn't look up.

conversation_marek.title: A Lesson by Marek
conversation_marek.text:
You sit down.

Marek sculpts without talking.

At the end of a while, he'll put his wood on you.

A dog. Kid. Not perfect.
But we admit it's a dog.

*"Brown when he was young. *

You look at him.

**"That's good. *

**"It's missed.** he said.
**"But it's honest. *

He's taking his knife back.

**"A beautiful lie is worth less than a false truth. *

He says that like it's obvious.

Brown opens an eye.
Then close it.

choices.text: "You know the legends of the Five Blades? »

marek_rumeur.title: The Rumor
marek_rumeur.text:
Marek puts his knife away.

You heard? *

**"What? *

**"People from the nearby village passed last night. *

He looks at the north hill.

**"They were talking about bandits on the road. *
**"More than usual. *

He pats Brun's back.

**"Probably nothing. *

He says that.
But he keeps looking at the hill.

boulangerie_matin.title: Bakery
boulangerie_matin.text:
The smell of hot bread invades the street.

The baker — Mira — comes out a furnace.

She sings while working.
Always.
Even alone.

She sees you and immediately puts something on the counter.

A brioche.
Still hot.

**"You still don't seem to have eaten. *

**"I ate. *

**"A sculpting knife is not a meal. *

She's pushing the brioche towards you.

His son Luc plays behind the counter.
He pretends to be a knight with a baguette of bread.

luc_enfant.title: Luke the Knight
luc_enfant.text:
Luc raises his baguette of bread.

**"I am the great knight Luke! *
*"Cendral Defender! *

He's charging an imaginary enemy.

The wand breaks against the wall.

He looks at both pieces.

**"...I am always the great knight Luke. *

Mira sighs.

**"It was for dinner this wand. *

You're laughing.

Luc looks at you with serious eyes.

**"You could fight for real? *

You meet Mira's look.

She smiles without answering.

choices.text: "I would protect Cendral if I had to. »

sculpture_bois.title: Sculpture
sculpture_bois.text:
You sit on your doorstep.

You take a piece of wood from your storeroom.

You're starting to sculpt.

No plan.
Just the gesture.

The knife removes thin chips.

Something seems soft.

A dog.

You look at what you did.

You're thinking about Brun.
To Marek.
Mira singing.
To Luc and his broken wand.

Cendral is small.
Cendral is ordinary.

But every face you know here
has a story.

You know them all.

rumeur_bandits.title: Bad News
rumeur_bandits.text:
A man arrives at the gallop from the north road.

He comes down from the horse screaming.

*"Brigs! *
**"About 20! *
**"They're coming! *

The villagers freeze.

Marek gets up from his bench.

Mira grabs Luc by the shoulder.

Everyone's eyes converge to a point.

To you.

Not because you're a warrior.
Because you're the only one with a sword.

endormissement.title: Sleep
endormissement.text:
Taera's fire was reduced to embers.

You lie on what's left of a wall.

The stars above Cendral.

Same as before.

You close your eyes.

Sleep comes quickly.
Too fast.

Like your body wants to run from something.

voix_nuit.title: Voices
voix_nuit.narrator: You're sleeping. Then you don't sleep.
voix_nuit.text:
Voices.

Bass.
Close.

You're half open.

The four sit together, away from the fire.
They speak in a low voice.

You hear snipers.

**"...no choice..."**

Quiet.

**"...if it gets worse..."**

Ikar says something.
You don't hear.

Aryn's responding.

**"...the elders were right about..."**

The wind covers the end of the sentence.

Taera shakes her head.

**"...not like Caël..."**

Your name.

You heard your name.

ecouter_suite.title: Bribes
ecouter_suite.text:
You close your eyes.

You're listening.

Ikar speaks.
His voice is tense.

**"...we can't wait for..."**

Vael interrupts it.
Slower.

**"It will be up to him to choose..."**

**"What if he doesn't choose? "** says Ikar.

Long silence.

Aryn's responding.

Too low.

Too low for you.

But you see Ikar lay his hand on his blade.

Just a second.

Then he takes off his hand.

Taera says something that looks like a question.

Aryn answers in two words.

They're all quiet.

Then Vael says something.

They're laughing slowly.

You don't understand why they laugh.

choices.text: Close your eyes and pretend you didn't hear anything.

confronter_nuit.title: What were you saying?
confronter_nuit.text:
You're up.

All four of them stop.

They're looking at you.

**"What were you saying? *

Silence.

Vael smiles.

**"We were talking about stars. *

**"Really. *

**"This one is the Northern Sword. * He shows the sky.
**"And this one is..."**

**"Ikar put his hand on his blade. *

Vael's smile disappears.

Ikar's looking at you.

**"I had a cramp. *

His voice is flat.
Not hot or cold.

Aryn looks at you for a while.

**"You should sleep.** she says.
**"Tomorrow the road is long. *

Something in his tone.
Not cold.

Sadness.

nuit_sans_sommeil.title: The Open Eyes
nuit_sans_sommeil.text:
You lie down.

Eyes open.

You look at the stars.

No choice. *
If it gets worse. *
The elders were right. *

The sentences turn.

You don't know what they mean.

You're building answers.
Each worse than the previous one.

Maybe it's normal.
Maybe they were talking about something else.

Maybe.

But Ikar got his blade.

Just a second.

In the dark, you tighten the handle of your black blade.

It's cold.

Reassuring.

refus_memoires.title: Not This Evening
refus_memoires.text:
Aryn's looking at you.

She's waiting.

You don't close your eyes.

**"Some other time perhaps. *

She nods her head gently.

No pressure.
No insistence.

But something in his eyes.

Like she already knew.
That this other time might not happen.

lore_marek_legendes.title: The Legends of Marek
lore_marek_legendes.text:
Marek puts his knife down.

He's thinking.

**"The Four Blades..."**
*"My father was talking about it. *

He looks at his hands.

**"In Aurenthal they have statues. *
**"High as houses. *
**"I saw them once. *

**"Did you go to Aurenthal? *

**"Young. * he says.
**"Before Cendral became my life. *

He's taking over his wood.

**"They also have a statue of Cael. *
**"But she's in a cellar. *
**"No one shows it to tourists. *

He smiles without humor.

**"To recall. *
**"Not to honor. *

lore_cael.title: The History of Caël
lore_cael.narrator: Vael throws a twig into the fire.
lore_cael.text:
**"Caël was your age. "** says Aryn.

**"About. *

She looks at the embers.

**"He lived in a village like Cendral. *
**"On the border. *
**« Far from Aurenthal. *

**"Someone predicted his destiny. *
**"That he would destroy everything. *
**"He was dangerous. *

Taera takes over.

**"He tried to leave. *
**"To isolate oneself. *
**"To protect others. *

**"And it killed him. "** says Ikar.
**"Not physically. *
**"It killed what it was. *

Vael looks at the fire.

**« Alone with the Chaos... »**
"The Chaos always wins. *

Quiet.

**"That's why we're here. "** says Aryn.

lore_ordre.title: The Order of Blades
lore_ordre.text:
**"The Order has existed since Caël. "** says Aryn.

**"The four wise men who arrested him..."**
**"...their spirits founded the Order. *

**« Their spirits? *

Taera acquiesce.

**"They died arresting him. *
**"But their minds remained. *
**"To form the next generations. *

**"They found us. "** says Ikar.
**"At seven. *
**"One by one. *

Vael smiles.

**"I found myself stealing apples. *
**"Great destiny. *

Taera laughs at her.

**"The Order selects one carrier per element. "** says Aryn.
**"By generation. *
**"We train together. *
**"We're waiting. *

**"Did you wait for me? *

**"Our whole life. "** she says.

lore_prophetie.title: Prophecy
lore_prophetie.text:
**"You really want to know? *

**"Yes. *

She's watching Ikar.
He's lifting his shoulders.

**"The Chaos porter will come from the borders. *
**"Born of ordinary pain. *
**"He will burn what he loves most. *

She's taking a break.

**"And he will choose. *
**"To be the storm. *
**"Or the end of the storm. *

Quiet.

**"That's it? You're asking.

**"That's all. *

You look at the ruins of Cendral.

He will burn what he loves most. *

It's already done.

lore_aurenthal.title: Auenthal
lore_aurenthal.text:
Vael's in love.

**"Aurenthal is..."**
A lot. *

**"How many? *

**"Many people. *
**"A lot of light. *
**"Many ordinary magic everywhere. *

He shows his hand.
A slight breeze swirls between his fingers.

**"Here it is rare. *
**"There the children do this on the street. *

Ikar looks over the fire.

**"And many people who are afraid of Chaos. *

**"Ikar..."** says Taera.

**"That's right.** he said.
**"He deserves to know. *
**"In Aurenthal the name of Caël..."**
**" ...it is not said aloud. *

He's looking at you.

**"Yours neither now. *

lore_forgerons.title: Aurenthal's Forgerons
lore_forgerons.text:
Taera answers.

**"Aurenthal's blacksmiths read the element. *
**"In the way you stand. *
**"In your breath. *
**"In your hands. *

**"They forge the blade accordingly. *
**"It takes weeks. *
**"Sometimes months. *

**"Anyone can have one? *

**"Anyone can pay. "** says Ikar.

**"What about yours? *

Aryn looks at his translucent blade.

**"Ours are different. *
**"The spirits of the ancient masters forged them. *
**"Even before we were born. *
**"They were waiting for us. *

She hesitates.

**"Yours..."**
"No one forged it. *
**" She was born from Chaos himself. *
**"This is the first time since Caël. *

You look at the black blade.

It absorbs light from the fire.

prevenir_village.title: Preventing the Village
prevenir_village.text:
You go around the village.

The blacksmith.
The baker.
Families.

*"bandits on the northern road. *
**"Stay home tonight. *

Some of them have no head.
Others lift their shoulders.

Bandits, they happen.
In Cendral as elsewhere.

Mira takes the head out of his bakery.

**"Thank you for warning.** she says.
*"Luc, come in. *

Luc protested.

** "But Mom"**

**"Go home. *

He's coming home.
